curation_notes: Locations derived from patch diff. The primary vulnerability is in createSafeError (safe-runtime.ts) which only shadowed __proto__ with a data property but did not call Object.setPrototypeOf(error, null) to actually sever the prototype chain. This allowed sandbox code to use native Object.getPrototypeOf or __lookupGetter__ to traverse the real prototype chain from Error to Function constructor. Secondary locations in vm-adapter.ts (createSafeConsole, createProtectedSandbox, createSafeObject) threw raw new Error() objects directly into the sandbox context without any prototype chain protection. The patch extracts createSafeError into a shared safe-error.ts module with the critical Object.setPrototypeOf(error, null) call and replaces all raw Error throws in vm-adapter.ts. 63 files changed total but most are docs, assets, and tests; 12 non-test source files changed making this a noisy patch.
